author: w3Lb
content: Plan: 0.3.1 was published BEFORE commit 8d72e5e landed, so the released 0.3.1 contains the Windows streaming-persist bug and its release notes must not claim the fix. Move the #116 entry from [0.3.1] into a new [Unreleased] section (becomes 0.3.2 when the user calls for the bump after verifying CI). Doc-only commit.
